{{Expand}}

{{Infobox starship
| name = Advocate starship
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Advocate starship]] is a sleek triangle of black and bronze.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c44">''The Engineer'', chapter 44</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Starships]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
